untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 12-month price range position detection and market context classification (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET regime). The price_pos_20 indicator provides 20-day range position only, not 12-month. Additionally, the reversal/continuation rates are context-dependent on market regime (69% bull/48% bear success rates) which cannot be encoded as deterministic entry conditions without a regime detector. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in original source.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate candle position within range using price_pos_20 (0-0.33 for low position, 0.67-1.0 for high position) as proxy for 12-month range detection. Long entries at range lows (reversal bias 73%), short entries at range highs (reversal bias 63-67% in bear). Used SMA_50 crossing as reasonable exit condition. Original signal requires explicit 12-month range calculation and market regime classifier not present in standard indicator set.
